prompt: A warm, candid editorial-style street café portrait of a relaxed young woman sitting alone at a small round outdoor table on a narrow European cobblestone street in late afternoon sunlight. She wears an oversized cream knit V-neck sweater and loose light blue jeans, with dark brown hair loosely tied in a messy bun with soft flyaway strands. She is seated casually with one knee drawn up, holding a small white espresso cup in one hand while the other rests near a saucer on the table. On the table are exactly 6 visible items: 1 terracotta potted green plant at the left edge, 1 glass sugar dispenser with a metal lid in the foreground, 1 black smartphone, 1 open paperback book, 1 white saucer with a small spoon, and 1 white espresso cup with a subtle red emblem. The café is beside a storefront window on the left, with a row of outdoor chairs and tables receding into the background on the right, soft pedestrians and buildings out of focus in the distance. Golden-hour backlighting, shallow depth of field, natural skin tones, cinematic bokeh, intimate lifestyle photography, realistic textures, soft shadows, vertical composition, medium shot framed from table level, highly photorealistic.
translatedPrompt: 一张温暖、抓拍风格的街头咖啡馆编辑人像，一位放松的年轻女性独自坐在欧洲狭窄鹅卵石街道旁的小圆桌前，沐浴在午后的阳光下。她穿着一件超大款奶油色针织 V 领毛衣和宽松的浅蓝色牛仔裤，深棕色头发随意扎成一个凌乱的丸子头，有几缕发丝垂落。她姿态随意地坐着，一只膝盖抬起，一只手拿着白色小浓缩咖啡杯，另一只手放在桌上的碟子旁。桌上清晰可见 6 件物品：左边缘有 1 盆赤陶盆栽绿植，前景有 1 个带金属盖的玻璃糖罐，1 部黑色智能手机，1 本翻开的平装书，1 个放有小勺的白色碟子，以及 1 个带有精致红色标志的白色浓缩咖啡杯。咖啡馆左侧是店面橱窗，右侧是一排向背景延伸的户外桌椅，远处的行人和建筑虚化处理。黄金时刻逆光，浅景深，自然的肤色，电影级焦外成像，亲密的生活方式摄影，逼真的质感，柔和的阴影，竖构图，从桌面高度拍摄的中景，高度写实。

breakdown.creativeCore: 黄金时刻咖啡馆人像：此提示词可生成一张写实的生活方式人像，展现一位女性在阳光明媚的欧洲街头咖啡馆享受咖啡的场景，非常适合编辑、旅游或温馨的城市品牌形象设计。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 人物头像、社媒头像、角色主视觉、个人品牌照
